case_title: OYEDEJI, ABIMBOLA VS EKEH, OLIVIA C.

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFT OLIVIA EKEH REGARDING PAYMENT OF JUDGEMENT, FILED.
DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGEMENT SUBMITTED TO COURT FOR ORDER.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY OYEDEJI, ABIMBOLA AS TO DEFENDANT EKEH, OLIVIA C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OYEDEJI, ABIMBOLA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EKEH, OLIVIA C. $650.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $670.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT EKEH, OLIVIA C.
